revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{DEFAULTSORT:ふとうみようおう}} [[Category:明王]] [[Category:密教]]」
Moving [[:Category:Deities in Vajrayana]] to [[:Category:Vajrayana deities]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Speedy]]
